heading: Limitation as to amount of water; qualifications of applicant
label: 431 Limitation as to amount of water; qualifications of applicant
text: No right to the use of water for land in private ownership shall be sold for a tract exceeding one hundred and sixty acres to any one landowner, and no such sale shall be made to any landowner unless he be an actual bona fide resident on such land, or occupant thereof residing in the neighborhood of said land, and no such right shall permanently attach until all payments therefor are made.
notes: Imperial Irrigation District of California; Nonapplicability of Federal Reclamation LawsNonapplicability of Federal reclamation laws to lands within Imperial Irrigation District of California, see , set out as a note under .section 4 of Pub. L. 96–570section 423e of this title
